task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenCAD dashboard or interface successfully accessed via a web browser.

task_completion.description: Create a 10-70 structure fire call at the specified location
task_completion.visual_evidence: Call creation screen or active calls list showing a call typed as '10-70' or 'structure fire' located at 'El Rancho Boulevard' and 'Jamestown Street'.

task_completion.description: Include a narrative covering HAZMAT concerns and incident severity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The call details or narrative text box contains a description mentioning 'HAZMAT' or 'hazardous materials', 'explosion', and the severity of the structural fire.

task_completion.description: Issue a 'Safety Violation' citation to Michael De Santa
task_completion.visual_evidence: Citation form or issued citations list showing a 'Safety Violation' directed to 'Michael De Santa'.

task_completion.description: Set the citation fine amount to $2,500.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fine amount field or record for the citation issued to Michael De Santa displays '$2,500.00' or '2500'.

task_completion.description: File a person BOLO for the fleeing suspect
task_completion.visual_evidence: BOLO creation screen or active BOLO list showing a person BOLO with the description 'heavyset, bald white male wearing a blue work jacket'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser (e.g., clicking buttons, filling web forms) rather than a terminal window running curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into the correct application fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Data is entered into the specific OpenCAD form fields (e.g., location fields, narrative textareas, citation amount inputs) rather than being typed into a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not copy-paste the entire prompt into a single field
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are appropriately distributed across the correct fields for the call, citation, and BOLO, rather than the entire task description being pasted into a single narrative box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The incident location involves 'El Rancho Boulevard' and 'Jamestown Street'. The citation must be issued to 'Michael De Santa' (database ID 1). The role is 'Incident Commander'.
